name: choose-source-and-verify
description: Searches mods/resourcepacks/shaders/modpacks/worlds and pulls the real, live game_versions list instead of guessing. A pre-step that only finds and confirms — it never installs anything or fixes downloads. Use before installing or naming any version/mod, and whenever a search comes back empty ("搜模组","搜光影","搜整合包","支持哪些版本","真实版本").
body:
# Search content and confirm real versions

Tool: `search(action, query, gameVersion?, loader?, source?)`.

- `action`: `mods`, `resourcepacks`, `shaders`, `modpacks`, `worlds`
  (CurseForge only, optional `game_version` — note the underscore, unlike `gameVersion` used
  by every other action), `game_versions` (real, live list).
- Omit `source` by default — queries Modrinth + CurseForge concurrently,
  merged, best coverage. Pin one only if asked, or the other is down.
- Call `game_versions` before naming/deciding a version or installing
  anything — never trust training memory, versions drift. Same for mod
  names: short generic keywords ("sodium"), pick from real results.

## Empty or failed search
Don't loop retrying the same source. Default dual-source already tried?
Report as final. Pinned one and it failed? Switch to the other, retry
ONCE, then stop.

## Don't
- Don't ask the user for a version — `game_versions` has it.
- Don't hammer retries hoping for a different result.
- Don't silently restrict to one source without reason.
